ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pin_types" (
  "pin_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pin type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the pin type */,
  "diameter_mm" REAL /* Diameter of the pin in millimeters */,
  "shape" TEXT /* Shape of the pin (e.g., Solid, 6nL Slot) */,
  "96_format_low_range_nl" INTEGER /* Low range of liquid volume the pin can handle in nanoliters for 96-well format */,
  "96_format_high_range_nl" INTEGER /* High range of liquid volume the pin can handle in nanoliters for 96-well format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the pin type */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the pin type specification */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the pin */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the pin */,
  "manufacturing_date" TEXT /* Date the pin was manufactured */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date the pin was last inspected */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector who last inspected the pin */,
  "warranty_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the warranty for the pin expires */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the pin type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pin_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pin_type_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "pin_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pin type */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the specification */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the version became effective */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector who approved the version */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the version was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pin_type_versions_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES inspectors ("inspector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pin_type_versions_pin_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("pin_type_id") REFERENCES pin_types ("pin_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, engineer, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "pin_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pin type being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the pin type */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the pin type was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration_seconds" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_pin_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("pin_type_id") REFERENCES pin_types ("pin_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pin_type_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "pin_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pin type used */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project or experiment */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the pin type was used */,
  "usage_description" TEXT /* Description of how the pin type was used in the project */,
  "quantity_used" INTEGER /* Quantity of the pin type used in the project */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the pin type was used */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator who used the pin type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pin_type_usage_pin_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("pin_type_id") REFERENCES pin_types ("pin_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pin_type_usage_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pin_type_usage_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project leader */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed, on hold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_leader_id") REFERENCES project_leaders ("project_leader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pin_type_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "pin_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pin type being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the comment has received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the comment has received */,
  "replies" INTEGER /* Number of replies to the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pin_type_comments_pin_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("pin_type_id") REFERENCES pin_types ("pin_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pin_type_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pin_type_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "pin_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pin type the image belongs to */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "image_size_kb" INTEGER /* Size of the image in kilobytes */,
  "image_format" TEXT /* Format of the image (e.g., PNG, JPEG) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pin_type_images_pin_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("pin_type_id") REFERENCES pin_types ("pin_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "pin_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pin type the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., Precision, Accuracy) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the performance metric */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was measured */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the performance metric was tested */,
  "test_operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator who conducted the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_test_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_pin_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("pin_type_id") REFERENCES pin_types ("pin_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspectors" (
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspector */,
  "inspector_name" TEXT /* Name of the inspector */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the inspector */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the inspector */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the inspector belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operator */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Name of the operator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the operator */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the operator */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the operator belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_leaders" (
  "project_leader_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project leader */,
  "project_leader_name" TEXT /* Name of the project leader */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the project leader */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the project leader */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the project leader belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_leader_id")
)
